name: Perpetua Resources
description: Perpetua Resources Corp. is a development-stage company focused on the exploration, site restoration, and redevelopment of the Stibnite Gold Project in Idaho, USA. The company aims to restore an abandoned mining site while producing gold and antimony, a critical mineral essential for national defense and clean energy technologies. By utilizing sustainable mining practices and building transparent community partnerships, Perpetua Resources seeks to provide economic benefits to the local region and secure a domestic supply of critical minerals, guided by a commitment to environmental stewardship and long-term project viability.
